title: Google’s exponential path to climate-wrecking digital bloat
summary: 文章探讨谷歌因指数级增长的数字服务（如搜索、广告、云存储等）导致能源消耗剧增，进而加剧气候危机的路径，并批评其缺乏可持续性措施。
highlights: Google's exponential growth in digital services is driving massive energy consumption.
The company's path is described as 'climate-wrecking' due to lack of sustainable practices.
The article criticizes the environmental impact of data centers and AI expansion.
